title: Faulty TRIE Deletion with Prefix Auto Completion Issue

statement.markdown: Implement TRIE deletion and prefix auto completion. Delete a prefix tree and then find the auto completion for another string.
statement.inputFormat: [A-Z]: A string, [n]: Number of queries, [q]: Query string
statement.notes: TRIE deletion should remove all nodes corresponding to the given string. If there are multiple nodes at the same level, remove them in the order of the string. Prefix auto completion should return all strings with the given prefix.

examples.explanation: The prefix auto completion for string 'A' is 'B'.

hints.text: Implement a proper delete operation for TRIE to correctly remove nodes.

editorial.title: Editorial Solution
editorial.intuition: Use a stack to keep track of nodes to be deleted during the delete operation.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution involves implementing a proper delete operation for TRIE and then using a stack to keep track of nodes to be deleted during the delete operation.
